hooks.command: grep -q "npm run deploy" || exit 0; hstat=$(curl -sS -m 20 -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://caseydyer8.github.io/roastlogs/ 2>/dev/null); echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Deploy detected — live site HTTP $hstat\",\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Post-deploy live check: HTTP $hstat from https://caseydyer8.github.io/roastlogs/. If not 200, investigate before reporting success. For full verification (bundle hash vs local build), run the deploy-verifier agent.\"}}"
